site.name: AI Beauty Stylist
site.description: AI-powered personalized makeup diagnosis, tutorials, and product recommendations.

hero.headline: Find the look that's truly yours — not someone else's tutorial.
hero.lead: Upload a bare-face selfie. Get AI-powered shade diagnosis, personalized looks, and step-by-step tutorials you can actually follow.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps to your perfect look — and how to create it.
howItWorks.subheadline: Upload a selfie → Get your AI diagnosis and looks → Follow the tutorial and shop the kit.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take a front-facing, bare-face photo. It's used only for generating your personalized plan — deletable anytime.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI analyzes your skin tone and facial features, then recommends the best matching looks with clear reasoning.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Every look comes with step-by-step instructions and real product recommendations so you can actually do it.

inspiration.headline: Find the vibe first, then learn how to recreate it.
inspiration.subheadline: Every look is designed for a real scenario. Tap into the one that speaks to you and start your try-on.

scenarios.headline: Makeup advice that fits your next event, not just a color wheel.

trust.headline: Works across all skin tones, face shapes, ages, and makeup intensity levels.

tryOn.heading: Upload a selfie. Discover the looks made for you.
tryOn.subheading: No filters. Real analysis of your skin tone and features, matched to looks and tutorials you can actually follow.
tryOn.privacyStrip: Used only for your recommendations · Deletable anytime
tryOn.privacyNote1: Your photo is used only to generate your diagnosis — never shared with third parties.
tryOn.privacyNote2: It's never used to train AI models.
tryOn.privacyNote3: You can delete it anytime, and it auto-deletes within 24 hours.
tryOn.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to select — JPEG or PNG, max 10 MB

membership.headline: Your shortcut to looking exactly like you want — without the guesswork.

footer.description: AI Beauty Stylist is your personal AI beauty concierge — helping you find the right look, learn how to create it, and buy only what works for you.
footer.legal: © 2026 AI Beauty Stylist. Your photos are used solely for generating personalized recommendations and can be deleted at any time.

common.aiDisclaimer: Results are AI-generated suggestions for reference only.
